backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Moved the JwtRequestFilter import to the top of the file to follow standard Java import ordering conventions.
Added security rules to restrict /api/search to EMPLOYER and USER authorities and permit all access to /api/files.
Updated the hardcoded file path to the Python AI model script to match the new local directory structure.
Reorder import statements to group custom package imports before or after standard library imports according to a specific coding style.
Reorder import statements to group project-specific imports before framework imports.
Reorder import statements to group third-party imports before project-specific imports.
Replace manual getter and setter methods with the Lombok @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
Add the @Data annotation from Lombok to the class to automatically generate boilerplate methods.
Remove manually written getters and setters that are now generated by the @Data annotation.
